scripts.build: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://pruebas.funifay.com/backend/public npm --prefix frontend install && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://pruebas.funifay.com/backend/public npm --prefix frontend run build && npx shx rm -rf .next public && npx shx cp -r frontend/.next . && npx shx cp -r frontend/public .
